recommendations.title: Arsenal
recommendations.overview: After the deadbeat brother of a businessman is assumed to be in on his own kidnapping, his sibling must take action to rescue him.

recommendations.title: First Kill
recommendations.overview: A police chief tries to solve a kidnapping that involves a bank robber holding a young boy hostage.

recommendations.title: Marauders
recommendations.overview: An untraceable group of elite bank robbers is chased by a suicidal FBI agent who uncovers a deeper purpose behind the robbery-homicides.

recommendations.title: Scream of the Banshee
recommendations.overview: An archeology professor unearths a dangerous artifact, unwittingly releasing a creature that is able to kill with the power of its bone-splitting scream.

recommendations.title: Extraction
recommendations.overview: When a former CIA operative is kidnapped by a group of terrorists, his son learns there is no plan for his father to be saved—so he launches his own rescue operation.

recommendations.title: Werewolves

recommendations.title: Silent Night
recommendations.overview: As their small Midwestern town prepares for its annual Christmas Eve parade, a sheriff and his deputy discover that a maniac in a Santa suit is murdering those he judges as naughty.

recommendations.title: Line of Duty
recommendations.overview: Frank Penny is a disgraced cop looking for a shot at redemption. When the police chief's 11-year-old daughter is abducted, Frank goes rogue to try and save her. But to find the girl, Frank will need the help of Ava Brooks, whose live-streaming news c

recommendations.genres: Action, Thriller, Crime, Mystery, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.
